page.title: Jet Ski Safari Puerto Banus | Boat Rental Marbella

data.meta_description: Book a jet ski safari Puerto Banus with Boat Rental Marbella. Ride the Sea-Doo GTX for 3 pax, departs from Puerto Banús. Instant WhatsApp quotes.
data.summary: Jet ski safari Puerto Banus departs from Puerto Banús on a Sea-Doo GTX (3 pax, 3.4m). Includes licensed guide, fuel, drinks, and safety gear. Pricing on request via WhatsApp.
key_facts: Sea-Doo GTX jet ski, 3.4m long, 3 passengers max
Licensed skipper/guide included on all safaris
Fuel, insurance, and safety equipment included
Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava provided
Spanish IVA (21%) included in the price
Pricing on request via WhatsApp – no hidden fees

faq.q: What is included in a jet ski safari Puerto Banus?
faq.a: Every jet ski safari includes a licensed guide, fuel, insurance, safety equipment, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, and Spanish IVA (21%). You just bring swimwear, sunscreen, and a towel.

faq.q: How many people can ride on the Sea-Doo GTX?
faq.a: The Sea-Doo GTX jet ski is 3.4 metres long and can carry up to 3 passengers. It’s ideal for couples or small groups looking to explore the Marbella coastline together.

faq.q: Where does the jet ski safari depart from?
faq.a: All safaris depart from Puerto Banús, the famous marina in Marbella. You’ll meet your guide at the dock, and the route typically heads east towards Marbella’s Golden Mile or west towards Cabopino.

faq.q: Do I need a licence to drive the jet ski?
faq.a: No licence is required for the jet ski safari. Our licensed guide leads the group and provides a safety briefing before departure. You can drive the jet ski under supervision.

faq.q: How long does a jet ski safari last?
faq.a: Safari durations are flexible. Most guests choose a 1-hour or 2-hour ride, but longer trips can be arranged. Contact us via WhatsApp for exact pricing and availability.

faq.q: Can I book a private jet ski safari?
faq.a: Yes, private safaris are available. You and your group will have the Sea-Doo GTX to yourselves, with a dedicated guide. Ideal for birthdays, bachelor parties, or a family day out.

faq.q: What is the best time of year for a jet ski safari in Marbella?
faq.a: The season runs from April to October, with peak conditions in July and August when water temperatures reach 24–26 °C. Mornings (9–11 AM) offer calm seas and fewer boats.

faq.q: How do I book a jet ski safari Puerto Banus?
faq.a: Booking is simple: send a WhatsApp message to our team with your preferred date, time, and number of passengers. We’ll confirm availability and send you a quote within minutes.

data.body_html:
Ride the Mediterranean on a jet ski safari Puerto Banus with Boat Rental Marbella. Our fleet includes the Sea-Doo GTX jet ski (3.4m, 3 pax), departing directly from the iconic Puerto Banús marina. Whether you’re a first-timer or an experienced rider, this guided safari delivers speed, scenery, and a splash of luxury — all with fuel, drinks, and insurance included.

Why Choose a Jet Ski Safari in Puerto Banús?

Puerto Banús is the natural starting point for any water adventure on the Costa del Sol. From its sheltered harbour, you can blast past the Golden Mile, spot the La Concha mountain backdrop, and explore hidden coves like Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés. A jet ski safari gives you the freedom to cover more coastline in less time than a regular boat charter — and the thrill of riding a top-end Sea-Doo.

Our Jet Ski: Sea-Doo GTX

The Sea-Doo GTX is 3.4 metres long and seats up to 3 people. It’s stable, responsive, and easy to handle even for beginners. Key specs:

  • Length: 3.4 m
  • Capacity: 3 passengers
  • Engine: powerful yet fuel-efficient Rotax
  • Features: intelligent brake and reverse (iBR), ergonomic seat

All safaris include a licensed guide who leads the group, provides a safety briefing, and ensures you get the most out of your time on the water.

What’s Included in Every Safari

Transparent pricing means no surprises. Every jet ski safari includes:

  • Licensed skipper/guide
  • Fuel for the full trip
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava
  • Light snacks
  • Insurance and safety equipment (life jackets, kill cord)
  • Spanish IVA (21%)

You just need swimwear, sunscreen, and a towel. We provide the rest.

Typical Safari Routes

Routes are flexible, but most guests choose one of these:

  • East to Marbella: past the Golden Mile beaches, around the Punta de la Mona headland, and back — about 1 hour.
  • West to Cabopino: along the coast towards the Cabopino marina and the sand dunes of Artola — about 1.5 hours.
  • Extended to Estepona: a longer ride (2+ hours) past the new marina at La Duquesa, with stops for swimming.

Your guide will tailor the route to your skill level and the day’s sea conditions.

Pricing and Booking

Jet ski safari pricing depends on duration and number of participants. Because every trip is customised, we provide quotes via WhatsApp. Here’s what you need to know:

  • Pricing on request — message us for an instant quote
  • No hidden fees: fuel, insurance, guide, drinks, and taxes are all included
  • Payment by bank transfer or cash on the day

To book, simply send a WhatsApp to our team with your preferred date, time, and number of passengers. We’ll confirm availability and send you a quote within minutes.

What to Expect on the Day

Arrive at Puerto Banús 15 minutes before your scheduled departure. Your guide will meet you at the dock, issue life jackets, and give a 5-minute safety briefing. You’ll then board the Sea-Doo GTX and follow the guide out of the marina. The ride is smooth and exhilarating — expect speeds up to 50 knots on calm water. Halfway through, you’ll stop for a swim or a photo opportunity against the backdrop of La Concha mountain. The guide carries a waterproof phone for group photos.

Safety and Requirements

No licence is needed for the jet ski safari. Minimum age to ride as a driver is 16 years (with parental consent if under 18). Passengers of any age can ride, provided they can sit securely. All participants must be able to swim and wear a life jacket. The guide monitors weather conditions and will cancel or reschedule if winds exceed 20 knots or visibility drops below 1 nautical mile.

Combine with a Boat Charter

If your group is larger than 3 people, consider pairing the jet ski safari with a boat charter. For example, book the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) for the family while the thrill-seekers take the Sea-Doo GTX. Both depart from Puerto Banús, so you can meet up later for lunch at a chiringuito. Contact us via WhatsApp to discuss combo options.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is included in a jet ski safari Puerto Banus?

Every jet ski safari includes a licensed guide, fuel, insurance, safety equipment, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, and Spanish IVA (21%). You just bring swimwear, sunscreen, and a towel.

How many people can ride on the Sea-Doo GTX?

The Sea-Doo GTX jet ski is 3.4 metres long and can carry up to 3 passengers. It’s ideal for couples or small groups looking to explore the Marbella coastline together.

Where does the jet ski safari depart from?

All safaris depart from Puerto Banús, the famous marina in Marbella. You’ll meet your guide at the dock, and the route typically heads east towards Marbella’s Golden Mile or west towards Cabopino.

Do I need a licence to drive the jet ski?

No licence is required for the jet ski safari. Our licensed guide leads the group and provides a safety briefing before departure. You can drive the jet ski under supervision.

How long does a jet ski safari last?

Safari durations are flexible. Most guests choose a 1-hour or 2-hour ride, but longer trips can be arranged. Contact us via WhatsApp for exact pricing and availability.

Can I book a private jet ski safari?

Yes, private safaris are available. You and your group will have the Sea-Doo GTX to yourselves, with a dedicated guide. Ideal for birthdays, bachelor parties, or a family day out.

What is the best time of year for a jet ski safari in Marbella?

The season runs from April to October, with peak conditions in July and August when water temperatures reach 24–26 °C. Mornings (9–11 AM) offer calm seas and fewer boats.

How do I book a jet ski safari Puerto Banus?

Booking is simple: send a WhatsApp message to our team with your preferred date, time, and number of passengers. We’ll confirm availability and send you a quote within minutes.
